content: The Research tab contains: (1) Industry Reports — deployed web apps including Double Snake Game, Real Estate Analysis, Financial Crisis Analyzer Parts I & II, Robotics Market Dashboard, Tape Trading Simulator, Stock Trading Simulator, Robotaxi Market Analysis, Financial Literacy Calculator. (2) Research Papers — published in Nature Scientific Reports (2026, GRPO for LLMs), arXiv (VAPAAD, Green AI, Fine-tuning RAG), Artificial Intelligence in Medicine (cognitive impairment detection via driving data), Discover AI (medical imaging with U-net), Analytics (aerial forest imagery), and more. Co-authored with Prof. Shaw-hwa Lo on interaction-based neural networks (ICNN, IRNN). (3) Conferences — TRB 2024, FICC 2023, KGML-AAAI 2022, OHDSI 2022, AAAI 2022 Workshop W37. (4) Student Awards — students won Regeneron ISEF 1st Place, Canada-Wide Science Fair Silver, published in Journal of Student Research. (5) Books — 6 books on Amazon covering agent-based applications, AI decoded, asset prices, explainable AI, interaction-based learning. (6) Economics research — Art of Money Management, Trade Dynamics. (7) Empirical Asset Pricing — studies on greed, MVBS, stock returns. (8) Trading research — buy signals, time series, martingale optimal trading, alpha strategies. (9) Resources — Google Scholar, TradingView, flagship products (Yin's Q Branch, Central Intelligence Platform), SEC 13F filings for top hedge funds (Third Point, Pershing Square, Greenlight Capital, Paulson, Lone Pine, Bridgewater, Berkshire Hathaway, AQR, Ark Investment).
